queries.question: Show me children's books and young adult books illustrated by Jane Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Book.title 
FROM Book
WHERE (Book.age_group = "Children's Book" OR Book.age_group = "Young Adult Book") AND Book.illustrator = "Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?book a :Book .
  ?book p:title ?title .
  ?book p:age_group ?age_group_w .
  ?book p:age_group ?age_group_w2 .
  ?book p:illustrator ?illustrator_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?age_group_w) = "Children's Book" || STR(?age_group_w2) = "Young Adult Book")) && STR(?illustrator_w) = "Jane Smith"))
}

queries.question: Show me children's books and young adult books illustrated by Jane Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Book.title 
FROM Book
WHERE Book.age_group = "Children's Book" OR Book.age_group = "Young Adult Book" AND Book.illustrator = "Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?book a :Book .
  ?book p:title ?title .
  ?book p:age_group ?age_group_w .
  ?book p:age_group ?age_group_w2 .
  ?book p:illustrator ?illustrator_w .
  FILTER((STR(?age_group_w) = "Children's Book" || (STR(?age_group_w2) = "Young Adult Book" && STR(?illustrator_w) = "Jane Smith")))
}
